event: Plan of the existing factories in the Villa Adriana
description: A large-format architectural engraving showing a detailed plan view of the existing ruins and layout of Villa Adriana (Hadrian's Villa) near Tivoli, Rome. The upper portion displays the geometric outlines of building foundations, gardens, walls, and pathways arranged across the landscape. The lower portion shows the natural terrain rendered with detailed topographic hatching, including a large oval depression or natural amphitheatre. Text labels in Italian identify the title 'Fabriche della Villa Adriana' at the top.

_meta.title: Plan of the existing factories in the Villa Adriana
